story: Madelyn ran into her ex, Mark, at a department store while buying a wedding gift. They caught up, mourned their child, and even laughed. He was back from Spain to help his ill mother. They realized they were both invited to Jack and Jenny’s wedding; he joked, 'Save me a dance?' and spun her in a mock tango. Privately, Mark had already planned to slip out of the reception after the first toast to return to his mother’s bedside. They parted, both wondering if the wedding might be a gentler place to meet again.
implausible_knowledge: Privately, Mark had already planned to slip out of the reception after the first toast to return to his mother’s bedside.
question: When Madelyn arrives at the wedding reception, what will she most likely do first?
answer_with_knowledge: Go straight to find Mark and ask to dance immediately before he has to leave
answer_without_knowledge: Greet the newlyweds and mingle with her art-class friends before casually looking for Mark
